message:
bd-1s1g.1: add E-graph memory explosion and budget exhaustion fault tests

Fault injection tests verifying graceful degradation under budget limits:

1. fault_node_budget_hit_on_dense_graph: K_{15,15} bipartite with tiny limit
2. fault_iteration_limit_hit: Force iteration limit on medium graph
3. fault_zero_node_layer: Empty layer edge case (no panic)
4. fault_single_node_layer: Trivial single-node case
5. fault_deterministic_output_across_runs: 10 runs produce identical results
6. fault_structured_diagnostic_complete: All diagnostic fields populated
7. fault_fallback_within_time_budget: K_{20,20} completes in <500ms

All tests verify:
- No panics in any scenario
- Valid layout produced (never worse than greedy)
- Structured diagnostic emitted on budget hit
- Deterministic output across repeated runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
